args.command:
config firewall address
edit "Compromised-Ubuntu"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_ICMP_from_Compromised"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "Compromised-Ubuntu"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall policy
